rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (bot rate-limited, human said only 'lgtm'), so both correctly land on APPROVE with nothing to miss — recall ties at 1.0. Y is more rigorous and conservative: it states its checkout methodology explicitly, validates each diff hunk against precise, diff-consistent line offsets, and flags a real subtlety (ServingTokenization vs. ServingTokens) without reaching for unverifiable external facts. X is well-organized but cites a specific unverified upstream PR number (vllm#46022) and PR-body repro details not grounded in the given diff/ground truth, which is a fabrication risk that dings precision; it does add one genuinely useful actionable caveat about test-mock brittleness that Y lacks. Overall Y edges out X slightly on grounded precision while both are similarly actionable for a clean-approve review.
